title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: Michael Donovan and Vinnie Micciche discussed LLMs, with Thomas Howe noting agent models bypass data cut-off dates. They covered social content strategy and lead generation, emphasizing dealer-centric messaging. The team agreed to accelerate development, improve content for lead generation, and prioritize features aligning with the people, dealers, customer experience framework.

decisions.description: Incorporate Vinnie Micciche's feedback on tone into subsequent social media posts.
Automate all leads overnight to improve lead handling and address OEM shop lead requirements.
Prioritize features for the dealer portal that affect the company's people, the dealers, and the customer experience.

actionItems.task: Put together the revised social media posts and share them with Vinnie Micciche.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie Micciche receives a document with revised social media posts incorporating feedback.

actionItems.task: Find and send research about where leads are going.

expectedOutcome.description: Team receives email with data on future lead origination.

actionItems.task: Review and provide feedback on updated creatives.

expectedOutcome.description: Ziad Al Khatib receives feedback on the updated creatives.

actionItems.task: Put the outline material together and send it over to Vinnie Micciche.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie Micciche receives outline material for the content strategy.

actionItems.task: Improve the document to ensure Vinnie Micciche has the whole post in view, including the title on the graphic, copy, and caption hashtags.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie Micciche can easily review full social media posts in the document.

actionItems.task: Share the updated document with the reran control content with Vinnie Micciche.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie Micciche receives the updated document with control content for review.

tensions: Vinnie Micciche expressed frustration with the pace of development and the length of planning/roadmapping.
Vinnie Micciche interrupted Michael Donovan's explanation, emphasizing the need to accelerate and stay focused.
Vinnie Micciche questioned the need for dashboards, suggesting a shift towards narrative-based reporting.
Vinnie Micciche pushed back on using NADA data on social posts because they don't mean anything
Vinnie Micciche expressed concern about future leads given developments in LLMs.
referencesToPast: Reference to previous discussions on dealers taking control back.
Mention of a rebuilt dashboard at UMDO and its high adoption.
Reference to content that was discussed with Lena in May or June about why we would even need a blog.
Vinnie Micciche referred to previous content created for social media
Vinnie Micciche referred to Herinda's assessment of the coding copilot/cursor
